en: Does the company have a registered Safety Professional according to ministerial agreement No. 219?
Does the company have a current Health & Safety Program and Risk Matrices, approved by the Ministry of Labor?
Does your company have a basic HSE plan approved by the ministry of labor?
Does your company have an HSE policy?
Please upload a joint Health and Safety Committee Certificate, issued by the Ministry of Labor.
Does your company have an environmental register (environmental license or best practices plan in accordance with the environmental classification)?
Please upload a Certificate from the Ministry of the Environment.
